pi_items.source: Complete cancer drug list from cancer-druginteractions.org retrieved 2025-02-20. Actual count is 102 drugs, which satisfies the minimum of 20.
Complete cancer drug list from cancer-druginteractions.org contains exactly 102 drugs (5-fluorouracil through Vinorelbine), exceeding the claimed maximum of 80.
Complete cancer drug list from cancer-druginteractions.org. First drug in alphabetical order is '5-fluorouracil', which starts with the digit '5', not the letter 'A'.
Complete cancer drug list from cancer-druginteractions.org. Last drug in alphabetical order is 'Vinorelbine', which starts with 'V', a member of the expected set.

privileged_info_summary: The Liverpool Cancer iChart database contains 102 cancer drugs listed alphabetically from 5-fluorouracil to Vinorelbine. The first drug starts with the numeral 5 (not A as metadata claims), and the last drug starts with V (as metadata correctly predicts). The total count of 102 drugs exceeds the metadata's expected maximum of 80. The database is real medical data from the University of Liverpool Cancer Drug Interactions resource, last updated June 2022.
